hero.description: I craft modern, responsive, and performant web experiences with a passion for clean code and delightful user interfaces.

experience.title: Work Experience
experience.subtitle: My professional journey as a frontend developer.

description: Led the frontend architecture migration from legacy codebase to Next.js App Router, improving page load times by 40%.
Mentored a team of 4 junior developers through code reviews and pair programming sessions.
Implemented design system with reusable components, reducing UI development time by 30%.
Built responsive web applications for 10+ clients across e-commerce, fintech, and education sectors.
Collaborated closely with UI/UX designers to translate Figma prototypes into pixel-perfect interfaces.
Integrated RESTful APIs and GraphQL endpoints with robust error handling and loading states.
Developed and maintained multiple client-facing web applications using React and Vue.js.
Wrote unit and integration tests, achieving 80%+ code coverage across key modules.
Participated in agile ceremonies including sprint planning, daily stand-ups, and retrospectives.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of projects I've worked on. Click a card to see details.

items.summary: Full-featured online store with cart, checkout, and payment integration.
items.description: A modern e-commerce platform built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS. Features include product catalog with filtering & search, shopping cart with persistent state, Stripe payment integration, order tracking dashboard, and responsive design for all devices.

items.summary: Collaborative project management tool with real-time updates.
items.description: A Kanban-style task management application with drag-and-drop functionality. Supports real-time collaboration via WebSockets, team workspaces, role-based access control, and activity logging. Built with a focus on performance and usability.

items.summary: CLI tool to generate developer portfolio sites from a config file.
items.description: An open-source CLI tool that lets developers scaffold a beautiful portfolio website from a simple YAML configuration file. Supports multiple themes, dark mode, blog integration, and automatic deployment to Vercel or Netlify.

items.summary: Real-time weather data visualization with interactive charts.
items.description: A weather dashboard that fetches data from OpenWeatherMap API and displays current conditions, hourly forecasts, and 7-day outlooks with interactive charts. Features location search, favorites, and unit conversion.

contact.title: Let's Work Together
contact.subtitle: Feel free to reach out — I'm always open to new opportunities and collaborations.
